SENTRY_JCACHE_SDK_NAME - Static variable in class io.sentry.jcache.BuildConfig
 
SentryJCacheWrapper<K,V> - Class in io.sentry.jcache
Wraps a JCache Cache to create Sentry spans for cache operations.
